## What

Brief summary of what changed.

## Why

Reason for the change. Link to the plan in `docs/plans/` if applicable.
Link to an ADR if architectural.

## Test plan

How to verify this works. Manual steps and/or automated tests.

## Screenshots

For UI changes, include both desktop and mobile if relevant. Otherwise
delete this section.

## Checklist

- [ ] Plan written and approved (for non-trivial changes)
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated if user-visible
- [ ] `CONTEXT.md` updated if new domain terms introduced
- [ ] ADR added if architectural decision made
